title: OpenAPI / API Contract Cleanup
decision_rationale: The OpenAPI drift assessment confirmed significant but non-critical gaps. The documented endpoints were functionally accurate; what was missing was cross-cutting behavior documentation (tenant context, workspace_id, newer schema fields, ComplianceReadinessSummary schema). All identified gaps have been corrected within GL-203B scope. Stale tenant isolation claims in AGENTS.md/llms.txt require coordinated test updates and are deferred. No API behavior was changed. No backend/src files were modified. The OpenAPI is now suitable as a basis for GL-203C SDK prototype work.

drift_items.description: OpenAPI version was '0.31.0-rc' (GL-031 state) while implementation is at GL-202+
Info description referenced GL-031 and GL-030 baseline; stale wording
drift_items.resolution: Updated with GL-203B Developer Preview caveats, tenant context, workspace_id, X-Correlation-ID, security headers, and production-mode behavior

drift_items.description: No documentation that tenant_id is server-derived and not client-supplied
drift_items.resolution: Added to info description and security scheme descriptions

drift_items.description: workspace_id not documented anywhere in OpenAPI
drift_items.resolution: Added to info description and AuditEvent schema

drift_items.description: 404/empty list behavior for cross-tenant access not documented
drift_items.resolution: Added to info description and GET /grant-requests description

drift_items.description: OpenAPI showed OperatorToken only; implementation allows both LegacyAdminToken and OperatorToken
drift_items.resolution: Updated security to include both LegacyAdminToken and OperatorToken

drift_items.description: Response schema missing 'active' and 'tenantId' fields returned by implementation
drift_items.resolution: Added both fields to response schema

drift_items.description: AuditEvent schema missing tenant_id, workspace_id, scope, row_hash, prev_hash fields added in GL-200B
drift_items.resolution: Added all five fields with appropriate documentation

drift_items.description: ComplianceReadinessSummary schema referenced at /compliance/readiness/build but not defined in components/schemas
Security scheme descriptions did not mention tenant context derivation or auth safety details
drift_items.resolution: Updated both LegacyAdminToken and OperatorToken descriptions

endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.health_readiness_public: VERIFIED — GET /health, GET /readiness require no auth (unchanged)
endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.protected_business_endpoints: VERIFIED — all mutating and business endpoints require auth (unchanged)
endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.demo_action_auth_required: VERIFIED — POST /demo-action requires auth regardless of demo flag (unchanged)
endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.grant_requests_get_fixed: FIXED — GET /grant-requests now documents both LegacyAdminToken and OperatorToken
endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.operator_me_schema_updated: UPDATED — /operators/me response now includes active and tenantId fields
endpoint_auth_boundary_cleanup.no_tenant_override_header: CONFIRMED — no arbitrary tenant override header documented (tenant is always server-derived)

tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.tenant_context_documented: DONE — info description states tenant_id is server-derived from auth, not client-supplied
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.workspace_id_documented: DONE — info description and AuditEvent schema document workspace_id as reserved/nullable/deferred
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.cross_tenant_denial_documented: DONE — info description and GET /grant-requests describe 404/empty list behavior
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.security_schemes_updated: DONE — both auth scheme descriptions state how tenant context is derived
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.audit_event_tenant_fields: DONE — tenant_id, workspace_id, scope added to AuditEvent schema (GL-200B)
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.stale_claim_in_agents_md_llms: NOT_UPDATED — AGENTS.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt still say 'Tenant isolation is not implemented'; updating would break many existing tests; deferred
tenant_workspace_contract_cleanup.production_complete_not_claimed: CONFIRMED — no claim that tenant/workspace isolation is production-complete

auth_config_contract_cleanup.production_mode_fail_closed: DOCUMENTED — info description notes startup fail-closed for placeholder tokens in staging/production
auth_config_contract_cleanup.admin_token_safety: DOCUMENTED — constant-time HMAC, tenant bound to demo, fail-closed notes
auth_config_contract_cleanup.operator_token_safety: DOCUMENTED — PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 600000 iterations, single issuance, tenant from operator record
auth_config_contract_cleanup.security_headers_documented: DOCUMENTED — X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Cache-Control, CSP listed in info
auth_config_contract_cleanup.no_secrets_in_openapi: CONFIRMED — no real token values or placeholder secrets in OpenAPI examples

audit_error_response_contract_cleanup.audit_event_schema_updated: DONE — added row_hash, prev_hash, tenant_id, workspace_id, scope fields
audit_error_response_contract_cleanup.gl030_error_contract_retained: DONE — error shape documented in info description
audit_error_response_contract_cleanup.error_refs_consistent: VERIFIED — all error responses reference ErrorResponse schema
audit_error_response_contract_cleanup.no_exploit_details: CONFIRMED — no cross-tenant existence leak details or exploit guidance

remaining_blockers_before_sdk_prototype: Stale tenant isolation claims in AGENTS.md/llms.txt require coordinated correction
sdk_readiness_impact.sdk_readiness_assessment: OpenAPI is now suitable as a basis for GL-203C SDK prototype work. No SDK code created in GL-203B.

files_changed.change: Updated version, info description, GET /grant-requests security, /operators/me schema, AuditEvent schema, ComplianceReadinessSummary schema, security scheme descriptions

findings.summary: ComplianceReadinessSummary schema referenced in /compliance/readiness/build but not defined in components/schemas
findings.action: Added complete schema definition in GL-203B

findings.summary: AuditEvent schema missing GL-200B fields: tenant_id, workspace_id, scope, row_hash, prev_hash
findings.action: Added all fields to AuditEvent schema in GL-203B

findings.summary: OpenAPI info description stale (GL-031 reference); missing Developer Preview caveat, tenant context, workspace_id, X-Correlation-ID
GET /grant-requests security showed OperatorToken only; implementation allows both LegacyAdminToken and OperatorToken
findings.action: Fixed to include both in GL-203B

findings.summary: /operators/me response schema missing active and tenantId fields returned by implementation
AGENTS.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, README.md state 'Tenant isolation is not implemented' — baseline implemented in GL-200A/B/C
findings.action: Deferred — updating requires coordinated test changes beyond GL-203B scope

findings.summary: No cross-tenant denial semantics documented (404/empty list without existence leak)
findings.action: Added to info description and GET /grant-requests description in GL-203B

findings.summary: Security scheme descriptions did not mention tenant context derivation details
findings.action: Updated both scheme descriptions in GL-203B

remaining_gaps: Stale tenant isolation claim in AGENTS.md, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, README.md, SECURITY.md requires coordinated test update (deferred)
workspace_id enforcement not implemented (deferred to future issue)
X-Correlation-ID documented in description only; not a formal OpenAPI header parameter on each endpoint
Secondary-path tenant enforcement for evidence/provenance routes deferred

production_readiness_impact.current_posture: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries
production_readiness_impact.api_contract: Aligned with GL-202+ implementation after GL-203B
production_readiness_impact.auth_secrets_config: Hardened for Developer Preview (GL-201); not full production SaaS
production_readiness_impact.persistence_migration: SQLite ready for Developer Preview; PostgreSQL not live-validated
production_readiness_impact.sdk_package: Developer-preview adjacent; not published; not official

recommended_next_issues.description: Merge gl-203b-openapi-api-contract-cleanup to internal main after validation
SDK Prototype / Packaging Boundary — design internal SDK prototype against the aligned contract; define packaging boundary tests; decide on experimental public SDK timeline
Production Ops / Go-No-Go v3 — live PostgreSQL validation, backup/restore minimum drill, observability baseline, go/no-go decision for first external controlled pilot
